metadata.description: Focus management expertise for tvOS, iOS/iPadOS, watchOS, and visionOS. Covers SwiftUI, UIKit, and RealityKit focus APIs.

plugins.name: apple-focus-pro
plugins.description: Expert focus management guidance for all Apple platforms. Covers @FocusState, UIFocusEnvironment, UIFocusGuide, focusSection, focusGroupIdentifier, HoverEffect, Digital Crown routing, and 14 critical anti-patterns that break focus navigation.
